title: 60 Pcs Metal Clothes Pegs for Washing Line with Bag,Travel Washing Line Pegs and Basket,Non-Slip Laundry Clips,Clothes Peg Basket,Clothespins Bag for Home, Garden,Photos,Clothing,Towels,Sheets
features: 【Comprehensive Clothing Pegs Set】You will receive 60 strong grip laundry pegs(55 mm x 30 mm),a white foldable clothes peg basket with a hook and a 1.8-meter pink washing line.This complete pegs and basket set includes pegs in 5 vibrant colours (dark yellow,grass green,orange,light blue and pink)–12 of each–adding cheer to your drying experience.Everything you need is included – no need to buy separately!

【High Quality Materials】Our non-slip laundry clips are made from high-quality eco-friendly PVC and metal,ensuring wind resistance,corrosion resistance.The elastic travel washing line is crafted from polypropylene and latex wire,offering great flexibility and breakage resistance.The zip-closure clothespins bag,constructed with reinforced steel wire and polyester,features a 360° tangle-free design for easy access and long-lasting use.

【Versatile Retractable Washing Line】The highly elastic 180 cm camping washing line can stretch up to 250 cm,offering great flexibility.Its ends have rubber-coated hooks that are easy on the hands and ready to use instantly.Simply attach the hooks between two points,adjust the washing line pegs as needed and enjoy a firm hold.

【Compact & Easy Storage】This portable clothes pegs and bag set is designed for neat and convenient storage.The entire set—including the retractable washing line (folds to the size of a tennis ball) and all washing pegs strong—fits easily into the attached peg basket for washing line with pegs.This storage solution helps prevent loss and makes your pegs and peg bag always ready for use.

【Wide Range of Uses】Ideal for both home and on-the-go needs,our pegs for washing line with bag are perfect for hanging daily laundry such as towels and bedsheets.They also excel outdoors for campin,garden and beach trips—use them to secure towels,fasten tent flaps or keep snack bags fresh.Indoors,they work wonderfully for photos displays or craft projects.Compact and reliable,these clothes pins are a practical addition to any household,travel bag or outdoor adventure kit.
description: " 60Pcs Clothes pegs for washing line with bag,travel washing line pegs and basket,peg bags,clothes line pegs,towel pegs for washing line with basket,storm pegs ✅ Clothes Clips for Drying Set ✌️Package Includes: 60 x cinch clips for clothes、1 x washing basket、1x washing line ✌️Material:PVC、metal、polypropylene、latex wire、steel wire and polyester ✌️Color: dark yellow,grass green,orange,light blue and pink ✌️Weight:190g ✌️Size: *Laundry Pegs:55 mm x 30 mm *Washing Line:1.8-meter ✅ Product Features: ✌️ High Quality Materials: Made from tough eco-friendly PVC and metal, these clothes clips are windproof, rust-resistant and designed to hold firmly without slipping.The elastic washing line stretches with soft rubber hooks that won’t scratch or tangle.The zip-up clothespins bag is made with reinforced fabric for easy storage and carrying. ✌️ Sufficient Quantity: This complete package includes 60 strong grip non-slip laundry clips,a handy foldable clothes peg basket and a 1.8-meter retractable camping washing line,perfect for home, garden, camping, and travel. ✌️ Wide Application: The clothing pegs are brightly colored.They can be used to distinguish different clothes of family members.They can be used to dry clothes, socks, sheets, hang postcards,photos and seal snacks, etc. "
